description:
Perform a data census of the MedinTux installation (local MySQL server, user: root, no password) for the DrTuxTest, MedicaTuxTest, CIM10Test, and CCAMTest databases. Save a structured, sectioned report to /home/ga/Documents/medintux_data_census.txt containing the following information:
- Table counts for each of the four databases
- Row counts for every table in each database
- Schema (column names and types) of the 'fchpat' table in DrTuxTest
- Total number of unique patients in DrTuxTest
- The five largest tables by row count across the entire system
- Total counts of CIM-10 diagnostic codes and CCAM procedure codes
